Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0E16 "CRILLION-0E16" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Crillion (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
NOP'd out JSRs at $0E49 and $2192 to remove highscore loading and saving to disk.
To allow the fire button in port two to start game during the intro sound, the following patches were made: 1. Patched the JSR $1FA2 instructions at $1F41 and $1F4C to be JSR $4000 instead 2. Added a small routine at $4000 to check the fire button in port 1 - if pressed, it then clears the last return address off the stack and then performs an RTS, which causes the game to start. If not pressed, the routine then jumps to $1FA2 to carry on the normal code flow.
